calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stephen Gould for Kevin Costello, Lawrence Costello and Terrence Costello (Co-Administrators).

Mr. Gould provided history/background and addressed the issue of the language in the order regarding the disclaimer and the disclaimer values. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K.Tauscher.
